textByHash.1b524d8c8b7fd1739473d34091ff5f4d2c4a707e: You poke 10 flashing pillars, right? You NOT poke other pillars, right? Okay, you go play now.
textByHash.c3338e10ed355802cdab89cdc3523f8d02cc6f83: No, no. If you poke dem ones dat don't have a dem flashin' rings, den dats bad.
textByHash.065efe296a1438b166ad31b65dd55fd47ba49ee7: Yer. You do dat ten times, you get prize.
textByHash.82b9616377013c53c6cb95e853e3a2a178162f71: Yer, get going. We get break now.
